Functional Requirements (15 items (Avg Quality: 78/100)):
- ✅ System shall generate visual summaries using Vision-Language Models (Qwen2.
- ✅ System shall embed document text into vector form using the MiniLM- L6-v2 model.
- ✅ System shall perform OCR on embedded or standalone images using Tesseract and Pillow.
- ✅ System shall display extracted requirements and summaries through an interactive web dashboard.
- ✅ System shall have a Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF) of at least 120 hours during continuous operation.
- ⚠️  System shall allow exporting results to external files (CSV, JSON).
- ⚠️  System shall store structured requirement data in a SQLite database.
- ⚠️  System shall ensure graceful degradation in case of OCR, VLM, or database errors.
- ⚠️  System shall display a visual progress indicator during file upload and process- ing.
- ⚠️  System shall integrate with Trello and Jira for automated task creation.
- ⚠️  System shall classify extracted information into Functional, Non-Functional, System, and Business requirements.
- ⚠️  User should not exist in database.
